creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
As stated by koobs, moving saved states from version to version is not supported by upstream.

While unsupported it does not mean it could sometimes work fine. But in general it is a risky operation.

The error cites vga, so it could be related to video configuration/acceleration.

Could you try the solutions suggested by koobs?


BTW I'm not maintainer of the port, I only performed the last upgrade.
